## Summary
Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

Use the same type prefix in your commit messages, for example: `feat: add cart item update flow`

## Checklist
- [ ] I linked relevant issue(s)
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or API changed
- [ ] CI passes locally or in GitHub Actions

## Screenshots or Logs (if applicable)
Add UI screenshots or relevant logs.

## Notes for Reviewers
Mention areas that need focused review.
